questions: Does the CLI have any library commands today?
Are the command dispatch, flag parsing, and HTTP client patterns established?
Can the item resolution utility follow the existing ticket resolution pattern?

answers.answer: No. The main dispatcher (src/index.ts:72-124) has no 'library' case. No src/library/ directory exists. All library command files are new.
evidence: src/index.ts:72-124 — switch statement with no 'library' case; commands: login, token, inspect, comments, org, tickets, skill, update
No src/library/ directory in the CLI repo

answers.answer: Yes. The comments module (src/comments/index.ts, 52 lines) provides the router pattern: dispatch via switch on args[0]. Flag parsing via getFlag/hasFlag/getPositionalArgs in src/lib/flags.ts. HTTP client hxFetch in src/lib/http.ts with basePath and auth. All patterns are directly replicable.
evidence: src/lib/flags.ts — getFlag, hasFlag, getPositionalArgs, requireFlag functions
src/lib/http.ts — hxFetch with auth, retry, basePath option

answers.answer: Yes. The ticket resolution utility (src/lib/resolve-ticket.ts, 128 lines) uses 3-strategy resolution (exact ID, shortId, number). Library item resolution adapts this for cuid detection, ticket shortId match (/^[A-Z]+-\d+$/), and title substring fallback. Fetches library items list then matches.
evidence: src/lib/resolve-ticket.ts — extractTicketRef + matchTicket with multi-strategy resolution
Research report specifies 3 strategies: cuid (starts with 'c', 25 chars), ticket shortId, title match

statement: The CLI needs 7 new files in a new src/library/ module (router, list, show, comments router, comments-list, comments-post) plus a resolve-library-item utility in src/lib/. Two existing files need modification: src/index.ts (add library case) and skill-content/SKILL.md (add library commands section). All patterns are established. No new npm dependencies needed.
